region.title: Region
region.description: Swiss region for region-specific offers and flyers

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of items to scrape per retailer

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL

webhookApiKey.title: Webhook API Key
webhookApiKey.description: API key to include in the webhook Authorization header
